title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXIII. Gaffers And Gammers.
content:
There was an old woman called Nothing-at-all,
        Who rejoiced in a dwelling exceedingly small:
        A man stretched his mouth to its utmost extent,
        And down at one gulp house and old woman went.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXIII. Gaffers And Gammers." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
